cnc-host.description: host name or ip address of the target CNC Cluster

cnc-port.description: port number of the target CNC Cluster

parameters.name: depth
parameters.description: limit the depth of nodes in response

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: optionally identify specific data nodes in response

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: xpath expression to filter data nodes in response

parameters.name: insert
parameters.description: controlling the order when adding new list elements

parameters.name: point
parameters.description: used to specify the insertion point

custom-template.description: Custom templates to apply when device is ready (list)

variable.description: Variables to bind when applying template one time (list)

iteration.description: Apply custom template multiple times with iteration (list)

variable.description: Variables to bind when applying template in iteration (list)

source-address.description:
Source address of policy. The value set on a per-policy basis
 will override the value set globally on the device. (leaf)

auto-color.description: Auto allocate color. Previously used explicit color values must be excluded from color Resource pool to avoid duplication. (leaf)

reverse-sid-list-name.description: Use a predefined reverse explicit path (leaf)

forward-sid-list-name.description: Use a predefined forward explicit path (leaf)

affinity.description: Compute paths with link color constraint (presence)

sid-algorithm.description: <128-255> - Specify the path computation metric options (leaf)

wait-to-revert-timer.description: <0 - 3000> -- seconds to wait before reverting. Default = 300 (leaf)

custom-template.description: Custom templates to apply when device is ready (list)

variable.description: Variables to bind when applying template one time (list)

iteration.description: Apply custom template multiple times with iteration (list)

variable.description: Variables to bind when applying template in iteration (list)

source-address.description:
Source address of policy. The value set on a per-policy basis
 will override the value set globally on the device. (leaf)

reverse-sid-list-name.description: Use a predefined reverse explicit path (leaf)

forward-sid-list-name.description: Use a predefined forward explicit path (leaf)

affinity.description: Compute paths with link color constraint (presence)

sid-algorithm.description: <128-255> - Specify the path computation metric options (leaf)

drop-traffic-on-invalid-path.description: Drop traffic when all paths are invalid. Default = false (leaf)

reverse-sid-list-name.description: Use a predefined reverse explicit path (leaf)

forward-sid-list-name.description: Use a predefined forward explicit path (leaf)

affinity.description: Compute paths with link color constraint (presence)

sid-algorithm.description: <128-255> - Specify the path computation metric options (leaf)

wait-to-revert-timer.description: <0 - 3000> -- seconds to wait before reverting. Default = 300 (leaf)

reverse-path.description:
Compute a reverse path that is disjoint from another path in the same disjoint-group.
Applies to working and protect paths. (non-presence)

forward-path.description:
Compute a forward path that is disjoint from another path in the same disjoint-group.
Applies to working and protect paths. (non-presence)

disjoint-path.description:
Compute a path that is disjoint from another path in the same disjoint-group.
 Applies to working and protect paths. (presence)

custom-template.description: Custom templates to apply when device is ready (list)

variable.description: Variables to bind when applying template one time (list)

iteration.description: Apply custom template multiple times with iteration (list)

variable.description: Variables to bind when applying template in iteration (list)

reverse-path-label.description: <16-1048575> - PM packets return to head-end using a label (leaf)

delay-exceeded.description: Emit syslog when the delay exceeds the threshold (leaf)

fields.name: fields
fields.description: optionally identify specific data nodes in response

filter.name: filter
filter.description: xpath expression to filter data nodes in response

depth.name: depth
depth.description: limit the depth of nodes in response

insert.name: insert
insert.description: controlling the order when adding new list elements

point.name: point
point.description: used to specify the insertion point
